description:
The ColorOverLifetimeTexture component samples a texture during life time along the X axis to get the color that a Particle should be.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.Texture: The texture to sample along the X axis based on Lifetime normalized to get a color for particles.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
